category_title: Visually impaired child with profound and multiple learning difficulties (PMLD) and low initiation rates
minimal_context: Leah is participating in an afternoon activity while sitting in her wheelchair at 5pm.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is 5pm, let's continue with our afternoon activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits in her wheelchair and frowns) Ah.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just a little bit more to do.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Frowns as her vocalizations become louder and more persistent) Ah! Ah! Ah!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is 5pm, let's continue with our afternoon activity.

STUDENT: (Sits in her wheelchair and frowns) Ah.

TUTOR: Let's keep trying.

STUDENT: (Continues frowning) Ah. Ah.

TUTOR: Just a little bit more to do.

STUDENT: (Frowns as her vocalizations become louder and more persistent) Ah! Ah! Ah!
